_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Determine information architecture and create sitemaps.
reference_document_element_description: Design and document the enterprise data architecture, including platform topology, data domain structure, integration patterns, and data lifecycle policies.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI DA domain. DA-T-001 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DA-S-001 (DA, cosine: 0.447), DA-K-003 (DA, cosine: 0.442).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.5/10 (raw 0.547). Shared vocabulary: [architecture]. DCWF-only terms [create, determine, information, sitemaps] vs WIDAI-only terms [data, design, document, domain, enterprise, integration] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.874 (P=0.881, R=0.868). Balanced P/R — the 6-word DCWF element and 19-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.8%). "Determine information architecture and create sitemaps." and "Design and document the enterprise data architecture, including platform topolog" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.498 ≈ STS 0.547 (gap 0.048). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [architecture] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 10.0%. Shared tokens: [architecture]. DCWF-only: [create, determine, information, sitemaps]. WIDAI-only: [data, design, document, domain, enterprise, integration].
